recommendations.title: Magic
recommendations.overview: A ventriloquist is at the mercy of his vicious dummy while he tries to renew a romance with his high school sweetheart.

recommendations.title: Shadowlands
recommendations.overview: C.S. Lewis, a world-renowned writer and professor, leads a passionless life until he meets spirited poet Joy Gresham.

recommendations.title: In Love and War

recommendations.title: A Chorus Line

recommendations.title: Closing the Ring

recommendations.title: Scent of a Woman
recommendations.overview: Charlie Simms is a student at a private preparatory school who comes from a poor family. To earn the money for his flight home to Gresham, Oregon for Christmas, Charlie takes a job over Thanksgiving looking after retired U.S. Army officer Lieutenant

recommendations.title: The Glenn Miller Story
recommendations.overview: A vibrant tribute to one of America's legendary bandleaders, charting Glenn Miller's rise from obscurity and poverty to fame and wealth in the early 1940s.
